title: stelis tortilis
intro: Stelis tortilis is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis tortilis include reducing coughs and relieving congestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Stelis tortilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat fever, sore throats, and skin conditions.
